title: BreadBoard Tool Result v1
description: Terminal outcome record for a tool call.

call_id.description: Tool call identifier this result belongs to.

state.description: Terminal state reached by the tool call.

result_payload.description: Structured success payload when state is completed.

error_payload.description: Structured error payload when execution fails.

resource_usage.description: Optional resource accounting metadata (tokens, time, CPU, etc.).

finished_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the tool call finished.
